coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in should clarify Priya’s post-launch state and align her expected next-quarter ownership before the billing rewrite shifts senior-level scope.
openingQuestion: What feels most important to sort through after Monday’s launch, especially as you think about what you want to own next quarter?
listenFor: whether she names a specific unresolved issue from the launch rather than just saying she is tired
whether if they discuss next quarter she already has a concrete area, project, or interface in mind
whether she volunteers a specific mentoring shape, person, or time window versus keeping it abstract
avoid: do not treat her quieter week as a problem before you know whether it is normal post-launch recovery
do not introduce the billing rewrite as a fixed assignment before hearing what senior-level ownership she is already aiming for
goodOutcome: You and Priya have agreed one concrete senior-level ownership area for next quarter, including how the billing rewrite does or does not change that scope.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one specific example of her quieter week and one concrete ownership option tied to the billing rewrite so you can test assumptions without speaking in generalities.
